model.description: The [model](https://docs.pinecone.io/guides/index-data/create-an-index#embedding-models) to use for embedding generation.

parameters.description: Additional model-specific parameters. Refer to the [model guide](https://docs.pinecone.io/guides/index-data/create-an-index#embedding-models) for available model parameters.

inputs.description: List of inputs to generate embeddings for.

text.example: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
text.description: The text input to generate embeddings for.
